overall.description: A first-person perspective from inside a Delamain automated taxi in Cyberpunk 2077, driving through Night City's neon-lit downtown district. The camera views the cyberpunk cityscape through hexagonal-patterned safety windows, passing pedestrians and holographic advertisements before arriving at the destination where the door opens.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic automated taxi interior with hexagonal safety glass

events.description: camera pans right from front windshield to side window view

agents.ego_description: sitting in the back of the automated Delamain taxi, observing the neon city through the front window

entered.detail: futuristic car interior with red ambient dashboard lighting and Delamain logo on headrest screen
hexagonal patterned safety glass covering all windows
red illuminated dashboard controls and door panel lighting
distant cyberpunk buildings with colorful neon signage visible through front window

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a futuristic automated taxi with distinctive hexagonal-patterned windows and red interior lighting. The camera faces forward through the front windshield, viewing the neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape ahead. Around 8 seconds, the camera pans right to look out the side window, transitioning the view from the front cityscape to the passing street scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit downtown street viewed from moving vehicle side window

agents.ego_description: cruising through the city streets at moderate speed, observing pedestrians and neon advertisements through the side window

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking on the sidewalk outside the hexagonal window

entered.detail: large green neon sign with ORBITAL text and geometric design
bright pink holographic advertisement display on building facade
tall futuristic buildings with illuminated windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The camera maintains a side-window view as the taxi cruises through the neon-drenched downtown streets. Pedestrians walk along the sidewalks outside the hexagonal mesh windows. Various holographic advertisements and neon signs pass by, including a prominent green ORBITAL sign and pink holographic displays on the towering skyscrapers.

scene_state.functional_zone: arrival point with large green holographic advertisement

events.description: vehicle slows to a stop at the destination
taxi door slides open revealing the street exterior

agents.ego_description: arriving at destination, preparing to exit as the automated taxi door opens

entered.detail: large bright green holographic advertisement projection with geometric patterns
taxi door sliding open to reveal the street exterior
pavement and street level view outside the vehicle

segments.scene_description: The taxi slows to a stop at the destination, where a massive green holographic advertisement illuminates the area. The vehicle door slides open, transitioning the view from the enclosed interior to the open street exterior. The hexagonal window pattern shifts to the left as the door opens, revealing the cyberpunk street level environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from within a futuristic taxi as it navigates a neon-lit metropolis before opening up to the city street. It begins facing forward through a windshield with distinctive hexagonal-patterned glass and red interior lighting, viewing the glowing cyberpunk cityscape ahead. As the vehicle cruises, the camera pans right to look through the side window, where the view shifts to passing pedestrians and towering skyscrapers adorned with pink holographic displays and a prominent green ORBITAL sign. The scene then transitions as the taxi slows to a stop beneath a massive green holographic advertisement that bathes the interior in light. Finally, the vehicle door slides open, shifting the hexagonal window pattern to the left and expanding the view from the enclosed cabin to the open street level environment.
